title: Dependency Edge
description: Directed edge representing a dependency between two nodes. 'from' depends on 'to'. The edgeType classifies whether the prerequisite provides a consumed substance (material) or reusable infrastructure (tool). The flow qualifier classifies the circular economy role.

@id.description: JSON-LD edge IRI. Alias for id via @context mapping.

from.description: Node ID of the dependent (the technology that requires a prerequisite).

to.description: Node ID of the prerequisite (the technology that must exist first).

edgeType.description: Nature of the dependency: consumed substance (material) or reusable equipment/infrastructure (tool). When ambiguous, classify as tool.

flow.description: Circular economy role of this dependency. 'primary' for standard forward supply-chain; 'byproduct-reuse' for incidental output capture; 'waste-recovery' for end-of-life material recovery; 'recycling-loop' for closed-loop material return.

label.description: Optional human-readable description of what specifically flows along this edge.

wikidataId.description: Wikidata entity identifier linking this dependency to a corresponding Wikidata property or item.
